description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a deep, rusty red color and visible signs of weathering and corrosion. The surface is mottled with black patches and scratches, giving it a worn, industrial appearance. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement rings encircling its body, adding structural strength. On one side, there is a faded white diamond-shaped marking, suggesting it may have once contained hazardous or regulated materials. The top is flat and sealed, with a small circular cap or bung visible, indicating it is currently closed. The overall look suggests it is a standard oil or chemical drum commonly found in urban, industrial, or storage environments.
description: A large, weathered red metal barrel with black corrosion patches, reinforcement rings, and a faded white hazard marking. The top is sealed with a small cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red barrel with black patches and a partial white diamond marking on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly uninterrupted red surface and some black corrosion, no visible markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a plain red surface and minor black patches, no markings visible.
description_view_3: Rear view with the most prominent white diamond marking and black corrosion patches.
